subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous Rajasthani king is associated with the Mehrangarh Fort?
question_hi: मेरंगारघाट के लेकिंग कौन सा जाना जाता है ?
explanation_en:
Rao Bika is associated with the Mehrangarh Fort. He was the founder of Jodhpur and established the Rao Bika Jain Temple inside the fort.
